summary: Frontend-only smoke test of PM Kusum Vercel 404 fix on Emergent preview URL. All 4 critical checks passed: landing page renders, direct /confirm URL loads without 404 (SPA fallback verified), lead form POSTs directly to Google Apps Script and navigates to /confirm on success, and confirmation page shows correct product/price/CTA/WhatsApp link.
passed: Landing page loads at / with lead-form and all required inputs visible (input-full-name, input-mobile, select-state, input-district, lead-form-submit)
Direct hit https://tender-farmers.preview.emergentagent.com/confirm returned HTTP 200 and rendered confirmation-page (SPA rewrite works - proves Vercel 404 fix)
Confirmation page renders heading '✅ Step 1 Completed', product-title 'PM Kusum Starter Kit', product-price '₹299', 6 items in product-includes, proceed-to-payment button visible
confirm-need-help href correctly points to https://wa.me/919251002004?text=...

Lead form submission (Vercel Post Fix / 9876500099 / Maharashtra / Nashik) POSTed directly to Google Apps Script (script.google.com ...?key=pmk... returned 302 which is expected Apps Script success redirect), then app navigated to /confirm and rendered confirm-heading
State shadcn Select interaction works via data-testid=select-state -> state-option-Maharashtra (with force click)
Consent checkbox is no longer required (form submitted without any consent field)
notes: Apps Script returned 302 to fetch() but our code follows redirect and treats 2xx-after-follow as ok. Empirically the UI reached /confirm without triggering the error toast, confirming createLead resolved successfully. Backend was fully removed as described; no FastAPI endpoints tested.
